Welcome

Repairing wheels with workshop grit and finish-line attention.

MOSS MEKUS MAG WHEEL & TYRES PTY VENTURES helps customers restore damaged mag wheels, extend tyre life, and repair aluminium components with a practical, detail-led approach. We also buy and sell rims and supply tyres in all sizes. Whether the job is cosmetic, structural, or urgent, we focus on honest assessment, dependable workmanship, and clean results.

What We Do

Choose the service you need.

Separate tabs make it easy to see how we help with repairs, welding, tyres, and rims.

01

Mag Wheel Repair

We repair cracked, buckled, leaking, scratched, and curb-damaged mag wheels with careful inspection and practical repair advice.

  • Crack repair and leak checks
  • Buckled wheel straightening
  • Rim refurbishment and cosmetic finishing
  • Valve, bead, and seal checks
02

Aluminium Welding

Aluminium welding for damaged mag wheels and selected aluminium components, handled with proper preparation and clean finishing.

  • Alloy wheel welding
  • Crack preparation and reinforcement
  • Repair finishing and inspection
  • Advice on whether repair or replacement is best
03

Tyre Services, Tyre Sales & Rims

We fit tyres, sell tyres in all sizes, and help customers buy or sell rims for daily drivers, replacements, and upgrades.

  • Tyres sold in all sizes
  • Tyre fitment, balancing, and pressure checks
  • We buy and sell rims
  • Rim and tyre matching advice

Workshop Quality

From damaged to dependable.

Every repair starts with the real condition of the wheel. We check the damage, explain the repair route, and work toward a result that looks sharp and performs safely.

1Inspect damage and tyre condition
2Prepare the wheel for repair
3Weld, straighten, seal, and finish
4Final fitment and quality check
Repair Cracks, bends, leaks, and cosmetic damage
Restore Refinishing that brings wheels back to life
Refit Tyre sales in all sizes, fitment, and rim buying or selling
